evals.prompt: How do I write a JUnit 5 test for my UserService that uses a Repository dependency?
evals.expected_output: Use @ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class). Annotate the repo field with @Mock, the service with @InjectMocks. Use AssertJ assertThat for assertions. Name test with @DisplayName.

evals.prompt: I want to test my Java code with 5 different input values. How do I avoid writing 5 identical test methods?
evals.expected_output: Use @ParameterizedTest with @ValueSource, @CsvSource, or @MethodSource. JUnit 5 runs the test once per input. Add @DisplayName to the parameterized test for clarity.

evals.prompt: My Java integration tests need a real PostgreSQL database. How do I set that up without a real server?
evals.expected_output: Use Testcontainers — spin up a real Postgres container per test class. Annotate with @Testcontainers and @Container. Name integration tests with *IT.java suffix.
